title: Dallin Sprague’s CV
text:
Computer Science Student | Aspiring AI Engineer
Brigham Young University–Idaho

sdallin812@gmail.com | GitHub | LinkedIn




Computer Science student with a focus on AI engineering and data science.
Interested in building intelligent, scalable systems and applying machine learning to real-world problems.


Machine Learning, Data Analysis, Accessibility Engineering, Backend Development



Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Human-Centered Computing, Computational Modeling





2023 – Present
Brigham Young University–Idaho

B.S. in Computer Science

Minor in Chinese Language

GPA: 3.87

Expected Graduation: April 2027





July 2025 – Present
Digital Accessibility Specialist / Auditor, Brigham Young University–Idaho

Conduct technical audits of university web applications for WCAG 2.1 compliance

Identify accessibility issues and document risks for development teams

Collaborate with developers to implement accessibility improvements

Research initiatives to expand accessibility services and improve student support








Developed an XGBoost machine learning model in Python achieving 92% accuracy

Applied feature engineering, data preprocessing, and model tuning





Built a GIS-based tool to analyze housing price trends by county

Integrated spatial data analysis and visualization techniques





Created a system to improve Chinese character memorization

Implemented stroke order logic and radical recognition features






Programming: C#, .NET, Python, Java, C++, JavaScript
Data & Tools: SQL, Pandas, Data Analysis, Database Management
Other: Accessibility Auditing, WCAG Compliance, Risk Assessment, Technical Documentation
Languages: English (native), Portuguese (fluent), Spanish (conversational)





Studying Chinese language and culture

Interested in global applications of technology and AI
